calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Title To And Collection Of Trust Asset
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Court denied the Petition For Spousal Property.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Continued To Sep-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for Colette Kelly.

Mr. Wall requested a continuance stating that the original affidavit had not been returned by the Petitioner. The matter was continued to September 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Sep-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for and with Colette Kelly (Petitioner).

Mr. Wall stated that the Attorney back in New York would not accept the signed 13100 declaration. The Court directed Mr. Wall to file a verified signed supplemental declaration. The matter was continued to September 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be taken under submission as of that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Continued To Aug-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
